reviews.review_text:
Recommended.
Small, quiet park out of the rat race but close enough to walk to cable beach.
Large sites with plenty of shade.
Stayed 5 nights, facilities very good.
Really pleasant grounds, laid back vibe and lovely amenities block. Nice, helpful staff and a great book swap.
Great little park, walking distance to Cable Beach, great amenities, lots of shade and awesome staff 💯

Very nice caravan park. It was quiet while we were there. The staff are friendly, and the park is basic but very well maintained. It’s kept clean, and the sites have good shade, with some on grass. It’s well priced overall, and we would definitely stay again.
Clean and tidy area, have value for money, friendly staff,big area nice and cool no dust. Very good 👍

We haven't stayed here for more than 10 years, we transferred our affection to another park in Broome, which became part of a conglomerate. Very happy to be back. The young managers do a brilliant job,  as do all the staff. The new amenities block is to die for.nBut you forgot to put in a disabled toilet

Excellent place.  good size sites staff always around attending to keep the place looking great. The amenities are in fantastic condition they are cleaned daily
Property cleaned. Family owned  not a corporate park if you get the geezs

We ended up staying four nights at Tarangau. The staff were very friendly. We called on Saturday at 4 PM to ask if we could check in that evening, which was no problem. The bathrooms are super new and clean, with good showers. We would definitely return. Close to Cable Beach. We verbleven op plek 36, lots of sun in the morning and lots of shade in the afternoon. Thanks team Tarangau!

We stayed for two nights and really enjoyed it. The space was great, everything was clean, the office staff were very friendly, and the bathrooms were spotless. Plus, it was the cheapest price in the area!!

Wat een schitterend mooi en schoon sanitair. In vergelijking met andere campings in Broome. Geen zwembad maar veel kleinere camping en ook gezelliger. Mooie camp keukens. Koelkast/ BBQ plaatsen, en kooktoestellen. Ruime tafels. He kan ook douchen op de camping als je hier niet verblijft dan betaal je 5 dollar. Voor 2 personen unpowered $44 . 15 minuten lopen naar Cable Beach.
Yes, good park good people. Recommended
best park we’ve stayed at in wa, quiet well kept park, really nice and clean toilet/showers

This park is NOT pet friendly at all. 12 pet polices on entry if you dont sign it you don't get to stay. Management very aggressive, don't write a negative review before you leave otherwise management will ask you to leave, which they did to us.

Awsome small campground with lots of shady sites underneath high trees. Nearly new and very clean amenities with great showers. Very friendly and helpful staff. Note that office closes at 4PM. Sometimes a bit dusty when very windy.  Good to have the speed bumps. 15 min walk to to Cable Beach. We didn’t miss the pool. Stayed here for 3 weeks. A real good alternative to other huge caravan parks.

Loved this campsite, the amenities are great: clean, spacious with great lighting. The staff is kind and helpful. It’s only 15/20min walk from the beach. It has been really quiet and the space is lovely. We’ll come back!
Good park for the price. Would have got 5 stars if it wasn’t for the over officious lackey abusing me for stirring up dust, of course it had nothing to do with the 30knot wind blowing at the time

Stayed here for 2 nights. We are allowed to change pitch at no extra cost as they had a few spare pitches.  There is an outdoor camp kitchen for it you to use with washing facilities,  laundry and washing lines available,  showers and toilets which are very clean.  There is a water tap on every pitch and grey waste facility.
Looks a bit rustic from the outside but the facilities are first class. Would stay here again.

Very friendly staff. Beautifully located, with a 15min walk to the beach.
Sanitary facilities were always super clean.
This is a great park well located in Broome
Sehr netter Empfang, saubere Toiletten Anlagen
Auf unserer Reise (NT,WA)ein Highlight von einem Camping, Sanitäre Anlagen Top👍👍sehr freundlich.Klein und fein.August 2025
Der beste Campingplatz bisher auf unserer Reise! Super nette kleine Anlage, mega hilfsbereiter Support, neue, geschmackvolle Waschräume - rundum toll.
Amazing! The best caravan park amenities ever! Thankyou , and loved showering to piped music . Love the massive toilet cubicles. Well done . Spotlessly clean .

What an exceptionally beautiful and tranquil caravan park!  We do a lot of travelling and this is by far the best caravan park we have ever stayed at.  It’s just awesome - we loved it.  We really wanted to stay longer but sadly all good things must come to an end.  So much on offer here.  Spacious, grassy sites with plenty of shade trees.  A small, very quiet park and so relaxing.  Staff are really lovely, just amazing - so very, very friendly and helpful.  It is easy to see that they work hard with pride to achieve the fantastic result that is Tarangau Caravan Park.  The modern amenities are squeaky clean throughout and all sites within the Park are regularly raked and lovingly maintained.  Pet friendly service too for those who need it.  Ample good, clean washing machines - very reasonable price to use.  We had our gas bottle refilled here - how convenient - also at a very reasonable price.  There’s plenty of large rubbish bins located in the Park, all of which are emptied and cleaned regularly.  We also took advantage of the car wash area.  We thoroughly recommend Tarangau Caravan Park - we just cannot speak highly enough of this Park.  It will exceed all of your expectations.  Honestly, it is simply a must to stay here if you are coming to Broome.  We guarantee you won’t be disappointed.   We hope to return to Broome and Tarangau Caravan Park in the near future.  They are the perfect combination and we fell in love with them both.  Thank you to all staff at Tarangau Caravan Park for making our stay an enjoyable and memorable one!

Wunderschöner, kleinerer Campingplatz mit ein paar Bäumen, Palmen und sehr guten neuen sanitären Anlagen, sehr gepflegt. Der Weg zum Strand sind ca. 10-15 Minuten. Total nettes Personal, kan man nur Empfehlen ;)

The site we had was a premium site and there was plenty of room for our van and car. It was a bit of a drive to the beach each day as there is no walk directly to the beach.
The amenities are very new and kept clean and stocked 👍.
The water pressure was not high but was adequate.
There was no drain for the grey water so there was a bit of a smell some mornings.
We thought the 2 x double speed humps on the main entrance were a bit of over kill.
I would go back
Probably best in Broome.  Quiet, fantastic facilities and excellent management.
A lovely park with nice gardens and plenty of shade. Some sites are a tad small, so ask staff if larger sites are available.  Amenities are relatively new, very clean and piped music plays.

I can highly recommend to stay there when you are in Broome :)
Super nice camping with loads of trees, modern & spacious bathrooms and friendly & helpful staff. Cable Beach is in walking distance. We really enjoyed our time there! 😊

This park is fantastic, the amenities get 10 out of 10 and the staff are friendly and always happy to help. The sites are great, lovely trees and shade where needed.
It’s a 15 - 20 min walk to the beach. Great spot!

The camp sites here are reasonably large compared to others along the great Western highway. Tarangau also had the best facilities I've seen in a long time. The new bathrooms and kitchen made it feel like I was really getting my money's worth. RAC and Discovery could learn a thing or two from Tarangau.

Nice, clean & quiet-ish caravan park. There are clear pet friendly sites away from the pet free sites, although some dogs were ‘entitled & loud’. We did have one bloke walk his dog right out the front of our van for the dog to do a 💩, look around and do a quick clean up & continue on… he did this a couple of times!
It was a very treed & shady park, apart from a few that had no shade & were in full sun all day - that was us.
The amenities were very new & clean, such a credit to the park for sure.

The bus stop is just out the front.
We used this daily.

It was a far cry from some of the old dated caravan parks that were in Broome.

Lovely quiet park, very modern & clean amenities. Very helpful & accommodating reception staff. Only possible downside was the camp kitchen which we didn't need, it was tucked away in a corner but seemed usable
Fantastic amenities, camp kitchen and staff. Small caravan park but big on quality and services. Would highly recommend to any travellers.

We loved this campsite. We had stayed in another campsite in Broome before this was much cheaper, much nicer showers, safer and much closer to town. If you have a roof tent this is quite sheltered so means a much quieter sleep! Highly recommend, one of the nicer campsites we have stayed in over several weeks. Bathrooms were really spacious and with lots of hooks and benches. The water was attached to the mains so drinkable.

Absolut inakzeptabel.  Hatten aufgrund der vielen guten Rezensionen einen ruhigen Park erwartet. Unser powered Stellplatz war mitten in der unpowered Zone die von vielen Backpackern belegt war, direkt neben der Campingküche. In der Campingküche hielten sich abends teilweise bis zu 20 Personen auf, Party und laute Musik bis 11.30pm, die Küche wurde schmutzig hinterlassen und auch am anderen Tag nicht sauber geputzt. Leider war es nicht möglich den Stellplatz zu wechseln. An Ruhe war hier nicht zu denken.
Wir hatten keinen Fleck Rasen auf unserem Stellplatz, nur Sand, hier müsste sich das Management wirklich etwas einfallen lassen.
Die Toiletten und Duschen waren sauber und gepflegt.
Wir können den Platz nicht empfehlen.

What a fantastic caravan park with amazing staff and facilities. We were having a few issues and the staff were extremely helpful and supportive which helped turn a bad day into a better day. Thank you all and we can definitely recommend that it is a lovely place to stay 😊👍🏻

A nice little park, Staff done everything to help us as the first site we were given was a bit tight, changed to bigger one with grass. Good amenities, short walk to cable beach. But you need to look out for the camel speed humps in the park ( double hump)

Fabulous Park. Lots of trees,grassy sites, very quiet. Managers do an excellent job. Grounds immaculately maintained. Amenities modern and always spotless. Location is perfect, walking distance to all Cable Beach has to offer.
Spent 6 nights here, amazing place, would not stay in town anywhere after staying here.
A very good park, well maintained kitchen, new toilets and showers which were very clean and lovely staff. Only thing that was missing is a dryer for laundry.
Sehr schöner und ruhiger Campingplatz mit viel Schatten und sehr sauberen Sanitäreinrichtungen. Sehr zu empfehlen. Zum schwimmen an die Cable Beach sind es 30min zu Fuss.

Great caravan park. So quiet! They let us choose from a few different sites when we arrived which was great. All sites are nice and shady and/or grassy. Bathrooms are new and clean. Easy bike ride to cable beach and Spinifex brewery.
Great camping. Quiet, well equipped, very clean and friendly staff. Recommended

What a lovely quiet park. Perfect for those seeking a more relaxed pace. Definitely the cooler months of June/July for visiting then you can take lovely walks around the area. We were here in late April and it’s been hot.
Pet friendly.
The amenities were lovely and clean and spacious.
Staff are friendly and helpful.
Beautiful frangipani trees scattered throughout.
Highly recommend.

Friendly welcome on arrival.  I chose site 46 - grassy & shady.  Gardens are beautiful & very well looked after. As has been mentioned,  the amenities are modern & very clean.  The whole park is well maintained. Best value, close to Cable Beach, bus stop at the door. Winner 👍
Lovely place and people

Best caravan park we've ever been to since traveling around Australia. Friendly staff, very clean, quiet, and well-organized! We lived there for months and completely enjoyed our stay from the beginning. Special thanks to Camille and Camilla, two lovely ladies who made us feel at home.

Great call and clean lace to stay in Cable Beach. Newly renovated ablution block with water pressure in the shower. I repeat water pressure !!! Open outdoor kitchen with all needed equipment. Some shade on almost every camp spot and some frilled lezard popping by from time to time. What more to ask ?
Cleanest park I have stayed at.

We stayed for 6 nights in early September. The amenities were fantastic. Camp kitchen is well-equipped and though it does get busy some evenings, the wait was never long. The newer toilet/shower block is easily one of the nicest we've come across in Australia. The staff are friendly and helpful. A quick drive to town or there's a bus stop across from the entrance.

Very clean, quiet and tidy caravan park. The staff is super friendly, the amenities a dream and the camp kitchen well equipped.
Nice spacious spots with lots of shade available - we stayed here over a week due to car issues and felt very at home. Especially the cheap ice-cream at the reception and the car & pet wash is a nice touch. There is also laundry available for 5$ and a weekly Bocca game on Thursdays.
Broome Explorer bus stop directly in front of the park and Cable Beach is at walking distance (20 mins).
Lovely shaded sites, amenities are first class, very well priced and close to Cable Beach.   Highly recommend.

Kleiner, feiner und ruhiger Campingplatz in Broome. Die Cable Beach ist zu Fuss bestens zu erreichen. Die Sanitäranlagen sind top, das Personal sehr freundlich. Für einen Aufenthalt in Broome sehr zu empfehlen!

Most amazing campground in Australia!
I'm booked an unpowered site for more than two nights, we are paying $42 per night for two people.
Small site for car + rooftoptent.
Great organised campkitchen, included stove, oven, microwave, kettle, phone charger, shelter, fridges with baskets, ...
Bathroom is amazing and always clean, separate toilets so it's never to far.

Wifi around office, lots of free books, very friendly staff.

Car and pet wash possible (you need coins)

Laundry $5

The manager really thought about every detail what travellers might need.

I could say so much more in this review, but I need to come to the end: highly recommended!!

Very nice amenities and clean grounds, cool there is a couple of resident frillneck lizards.

Car and dog washing facilities available

An easy walk to nice restaurants and the beach access.
Nice park, was OK but very dusty as expected, good location.
Great park, modern very clean amenities vey helpful staff.

I booked 6 months in advance and then got a job with accommodation in Broome. I cancelled three months before my booking and still they kept $60. This I believe is double dipping as they absolutely would have resold our site. Had bookings with RAC and Discovery. Both refunded in full. Would never book at Tarangau again.

I can not rate this park highly enough! Amenities clean and well fitted out. Staff are the high point, sites raked clean after every exit, but more importantly, they were extremely  accommodating when we required a prolonged stay due to illness. I can't  thank them enough.  Highly recommended 🥰

Great place to stay. Very clean facilities and ably kept so by Camilla. The grounds as well by all the staff. Not too far to walk to Cable Beach.
They could use squeegees in the bathrooms would be more effective than the mops. And some shelves or hooks in the unisex bathrooms.

Wonderful 2 x weeks at Tarangau Park Broome.
Lovely amenities, we will be back for sure

Wonderful campsite with the cleanest, newest and best-designed ablution block! Fantastic washing machines and dryers too. The site itself is beautiful with huge trees between each site, providing great shade as well as making the place look like the Botanical Gardens. Very helpful staff - all in all, the best campsite yet!
This place is the best. DANIAL was a great hostest... even when I messed up my reservation..
Pretty new bathroom beautiful

What a great spot to stay in Broome. Close and possible walk to beach.
We came here as an emergency stay on the back of a tilt tray from the Gibb river road with an unknown duration. The team did a great job accommodating us for an extended period in peak time.
The park amenities are brand new and fantastic layout and kept very clean .
The whole team take great care of the park and always assist where they can.
Thank you so much team Tarangau for looking after us during our breakdown stay with you.
We greatly appreciated your efforts
Cheers
Graham and Jo

Stayed at tarangau in may 2024, it was an amazing stay, staff are so helpful and friendly, went out of their way to make our stay a good one, which it was, highly recommended,  great new amenitie site, could not fault it, thank you to all the staff 😀

Really recommend this caravan park!  We stayed 3 weeks here, we kept extending our stay it was that good. The amenities are new and beautiful, it has shady sites, it's quiet and it's an easy walk to Cable Beach. The team here are super friendly and take pride in keeping the park to a wonderful standard. It's a carvan park that I would recommend to travellers heading to Broome.

Cleanest and best ablutions block I have seen.
Helpful staff very professional and friendly.
Some sites are a little small but very nice place.
Great quiet little park. Short walk to the beach via a couple of blocks. New big amenities. Grounds and amenities always clean. Will definitely stay again.
Was great 👍

Great little caravan park close to everything with amazing facilities. Sites are green and well looked after. The staff are very friendly and helpful. Would recommend this park to everyone visiting Broome.

Excellent customer service, excellent facilities and great atmosphere. The campground has amazing toilets and great for both unpowered and powered sites. The whole area is very shady and they take great pride in maintaining the park.
An absolutely beautiful park. Ammenities are brand new and just stunning. Jennica and all the staff are so friendly and helpful. Highly recommend.

Fantastic new facilities. A nice quiet caravan park that caters for all. I highly recommend staying here if there is space. I can see that it will fill up fast in peak season. Friendly staff and a pleasure to stay here. Will come again.
Great location & friendly staff. 😎

Our 2nd stay and Jennica & Marcel are still the wonderful hosts here. Cool, green & shaded manicured sites (that are reasonably priced) with modern immaculate amenities. Do yourself a favour and stay here, you won't regret it ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Meilleur camping qualité prix de broom! Les toilettes et les douches sont super clean ! La connexion est okay et le personnel très gentil!
Ils ont en option des machines à laver et une kitchenette au top ! 👍

Tarangau caravan park, is a small, family owned caravan park. I would say one of the best in Broome if you’re looking for tranquility. Just 10 min walks from Cable Beach, it’s perfectly located.
The managers (Jennica & Marcel) are very welcoming, friendly and above all generous, they use a lot of their free time to organize special events (all donations are sent to the RFDS). I would totally recommend this caravan park to friends and family, the common areas are always clean, the trees and plants are so well maintained, all that by being the cheapest in the area!

Stayed here awhile ago now. It was very quiet. No pool that I saw. Amenities are very clean.
Would definitely stay again.

Expected a relaxed, nice caravan park as most reviews suggest it is, which is why we picked this place. Instead we faced rude and unhelpful staff, and a rather inconvenient campground. There is no wifi or pool as other campgrounds offer, although the price is the same. When we expressed our concerns to the staff we got the response to “go to another place”.

Hands down the worst Customer service I've experienced on my Roadtrip around Australia - Travellers stay away

The park itself is subpar - no pool, dirt areas for ground tents, only 1 kitchen in the entire park where everyone seems to hang out and sit around making it awkward when you want to use it for yourself, the largest speed bumps I've ever seen making it difficult for lower vehicles to access and the price is $40 for unpowered areas!

The staff  members we spoke to have no customer service skills whatsoever rather then being nice and friendly they were blatantly accusing us of using there services without paying and just straight rude towards my partner and I. They treated us as if we were sneaking around and trying to get freebies out of our entire stay - calling us when were out in town telling us we need to come back and pay today as our tent is still on the grounds - which is totally reasonable but the attitude of the employee and lack of communication is what made our experience horrible - we were told no information ie check-out or check- in times or where anything was.

They keep tabs and a close eye on everyone that stays so beware and make sure you pay through reception straight away or call them if they are not manned or if it is after hours, as they will chase you down relentlessly to get there money and then will target you after.
Is it ok to stay, missing a pool
Nice clean with heaps of room for your van. Be happy to come back again soon.

I really wanted to give this park 5 stars due to friendly staff, fantastic amenities and great rates. But it is badly let down by two things. Firstly it has those horrendous double-hump speed bumps that are just awful to drive over. Secondly, whilst I understand it is impossible to grow grass due to dry climate and heavy usage but far too many sites are bare dirt and the management really needs to look at replacing these sites with the  UV - treated fibreglass? pads for cars to drive onto.
But if you are prepared for these issues then by all means give this good, friendly park a visit.

Fantastic clean and well maintained facilities. Front office very friendly and nothing is too much trouble. Nice mature trees and nice gardens . 3 min drive to Cable beach.
We have stayed twice and will alway come back . Thanks to the staff and management .
Tony and Jackie
Quiet and clean
Great location close enough to cable beach to be able to walk there. Grass sites available and not as crowded or large as the other caravan parks
Fabulous shady quiet small caravan park walking or cycling distance to Cable Beach. Park well maintained and managed very well lovely young people who manage the park.

This is a great little park! If your not a fan of the “Bigger Parks“ than this pick for Broome !
It’s just nice and quiet- I love it.
Great amenities!!
Live music and food trucks are regularly here on Friday nights
Location -
Your opposite the Mantra - bus stop which does  a town loop
1km to cable beach we walked it every day so far  Divers tavern great pub less than a 1km walk.
It’s just so quiet!
Pets are welcome too!
This is great base for Broome !

I requested to refund two night from 2 to 4 August that I didn't want due to the fact it was a EMG place with no shadow.
I requested to refund on 2sd August before 10 AM and the management did not want to refund. It means that I paid for 2 nights for nothing and I requested in due time but no good answer
Very bad, it is not a professional behavior.

Thank you Tarangau Team. 11/10.   Our 2 months with you was awesome. We enjoyed every minute.  The park is an absolute credit to all its team members who work tirelessly to ensure the grounds and facilities are beautiful for the residents. Such a pleasure to stay with you.
Take a bow Tarangau - you 💯 deserve it.
We can't  wait to stay again - seriously the BEST park in Broome.

🙌🙌🙌🙌
Nothing bad here, quiet, great site, clean and tidy. Close enough to Cable Beach.
Well managed and close to everything by foot. Bus stop right out front added bonus. Well done team, we will be back and thank you 😊
Very expensive for a patch of red dust,and everything covered in bird poo
Very nice

Great location to stay at
They were so helpful and easy to deal with to get a camp ground
Lovely location to stay .not far from main town site

Stayed here a couple of times now. On the whole, a quiet cool wee park full of friendly people, staff and the owners are truly beautiful people, made an average forced stay in Broome far more comfortable. Highly recommended this caravan park to all who are travelling the top end.
